prompt: Keep OS interface identity inside DPlane adapter layer
note: Enforces the architecture rule that OS-specific adapter identity is hidden by DPlane and not exposed through IFNET, RM, or FIB models.
decisions: Removed OS identity fields from IFNET and above; FIB requests carry IFNET-facing identifiers only, while DPlane resolves Windows/Npcap GUIDs internally.
